title: Ericoides cephalotes
intro: Ericoides cephalotes, also known as Golden Shield, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Ericoides cephalotes include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used to make herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures that are used to treat various health conditions.
